chunks.en: Before I go out, I always put my wallet and my phone in my bag.
chunks.ja: 出かける前に、私はいつも財布とスマホをかばんに入れます。

chunks.en: Before I go out, I also check the weather to decide about my umbrella.
chunks.ja: 出かける前に、傘をどうするか決めるために天気も確認します。

chunks.en: When it looks like rain, I put a small umbrella and a light jacket in my bag.
chunks.ja: 雨が降りそうなときは、小さい傘と薄い上着をかばんに入れます。

chunks.en: One time I forgot my house key, and I couldn't get inside after work.
chunks.ja: あるとき家の鍵を忘れて、仕事の後に家に入れませんでした。

chunks.en: Another time I forgot my train pass, so I had to buy a ticket.
chunks.ja: 別のときは定期券を忘れて、切符を買わなければなりませんでした。

chunks.en: Now I always check my bag at the door before I leave home.
chunks.ja: 今は家を出る前に、いつも玄関でかばんの中を確認します。

outline: Opening: what I pack every day
Point 1: choosing items by the weather
Point 2: a time I forgot something important
Wrap-up: my habit of checking at the door

modelTalk.text: Before I go out, I always put a few things in my bag. My wallet, my phone, and my keys come first. I check them every time. I also bring my train pass and a small water bottle. Then I look at the weather. If it looks like rain, I take a small umbrella. If it's cold, I put a light jacket in my bag too. One day, I forgot my house keys. I came home at night, but I couldn't open the door. I waited outside for an hour, and it was so cold. Now I'm more careful. Before I leave, I stop at the front door. I open my bag and check inside. I say my things out loud, like keys, phone, wallet. It's a small habit, but it really helps me a lot every day.

chunks.en: Before I go out, I always put my wallet, phone, and keys in my bag.
chunks.ja: 出かける前に、私はいつも財布とスマホと鍵をかばんに入れます。

chunks.en: I usually check the weather app, and if it might rain, I bring a small umbrella.
chunks.ja: たいてい天気アプリを確認して、雨が降りそうなら折りたたみ傘を持っていきます。

chunks.en: One time I forgot my train pass, so I had to buy a ticket at the station.
chunks.ja: あるとき定期券を忘れて、駅で切符を買わなければなりませんでした。

chunks.en: Now I always stop at the front door and check inside my bag one more time.
chunks.ja: 今は必ず玄関で立ち止まって、かばんの中をもう一度確認します。

chunks.en: In the end, a quick check saves me a lot of stress during the day.
chunks.ja: 結局のところ、ちょっとした確認が一日の大きなストレスを減らしてくれます。

outline: Opening: what I always pack before leaving
Point 1: choosing items by the weather
Point 2: a time I forgot my train pass

modelTalk.text: Before I go out, I always put a few things in my bag. My wallet and my phone come first, and then my keys. I check the weather on my phone too. If it looks like rain, I pack a small umbrella. When it's cold, I bring a light jacket, just in case. One morning I was in a hurry, and I left my house keys at home. I couldn't get back in, so I had to wait for my family. It was really annoying, and I felt so silly. Since then, I've tried to build a good habit. Before I open the front door, I stop and check my bag. I look for my wallet, my phone, and my keys. It only takes a few seconds, but it really saves me a lot of trouble.
